articles.title: More US attacks reported in Iran
articles.summary: More US attacks reported in Iran The General Directorate of Crisis Management of Iran's East Azerbaijan province said that a military area near the city of Tabriz was struck by the US, but added that no point inside the city was attacked, state media reported.  Meanwhile, two explosions were also heard in Bushehr, with its governor Mohammad Mozaffari indicating that the "source of the explosion is under investigation". Further US attacks were reported in the southern cities of Chabahar and Konarak.
